response.original_title: [[((Quick Support))]] Can Robinhood reverse a transaction ?
response.overview: Robinhood usually does not allow transaction reversals  once a trade has been completed .[[ 1 ⟿ 888 ⟿ 576 ⟿ 2041 ]] In most cases, executed orders are final and cannot be changed or undone  The only exception is when the order is still pending [[ 1 ⟿ 888 ⟿ 576 ⟿ 2041 ]]  you may cancel it before it goes through. That’s why it’s important to review everything carefully  before placing a trade.[[ 1 ⟿ 888 ⟿ 576 ⟿ 2041 ]]
response.title: [[((Quick Support))]] Can Robinhood reverse a transaction ?
